title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses how design systems and context engineering guide AI agents in modern software development. MCP and AI agents work together to ensure consistent, correct application building by bridging design systems and code.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how design systems and context engineering guide AI agents through modern software development, with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) connecting the two. The core argument: pairing MCP with AI agents bridges design systems and code, so generated applications stay consistent and correct. The takeaway is that context management and design systems supply the structure agents need to build reliably rather than ad hoc.
